name: Licking Limosne & Limo-Buses
recent_news: No M&A or news found; no functional website located. Appears to be a micro single-location livery/limo-bus operator in Kirkersville, OH (Licking County) — not a school-bus contractor in the conventional sense.
sources: WebSearch: no direct hits beyond directory listing
fit_notes: Very small (~6 employees, ~$359K rev) limo/limo-bus operator; not a school-district contractor. Minimal tuck-in fit for Summit unless platform pivots to ancillary livery. Skip unless ambulette/SPED status confirmed.

name: David Transportation
recent_news: FMCSA SAFER lists DAVID TRANSPORTATION LLC (USDOT 2726482) — appears to be a freight/for-hire carrier, NOT a school-bus contractor. No school-district relationships found despite the 'special_needs' flag in source data.
fit_notes: Not an independent school-bus operator — likely freight/auto-transport carrier mis-tagged in source list. Not a Summit tuck-in target. Pass.

name: Early Riser Transportation
recent_news: No website, no news, no M&A activity. Only directory listing found at 20179 Coventry St, Highland Park, MI. Micro-operator (~5 employees, ~$358K rev).
fit_notes: Sub-scale micro van operator in Highland Park; insufficient to move the needle as a Summit tuck-in. Skip unless aggregated with other Detroit-area micro-SPED providers in a roll-up play.

name: MJS Medical Transportation
recent_news: Listed on Yelp (updated Nov 2025) at 18085 Joseph Campau St, Detroit. Name and category indicate NEMT (Medicaid/medical) — NOT a student-transportation contractor.
fit_notes: Medical transportation (NEMT) operator, not a school-bus contractor. Outside Summit's K-12 student transport focus. Pass.

name: Perfect Will Trnsprtn LLC

fit_notes: Sub-scale Detroit micro-operator with no verifiable school-district business. Not viable as a standalone Summit tuck-in. Pass.
